title: Most AI stocks look strong… but the price action says otherwise
author: topicspace
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/i4yeuxxy6osg1.png?width=2400&format=png&auto=webp&s=736813c0e868faa6b5c2115de1baf0d44ef67e63

I’ve been tracking a bunch of AI names lately (NVDA, MSFT, META, MU, etc.) and something’s been bothering me

A lot of these stories look really strong right now  
data centers, copilots, infra buildout, all that

…but the stocks aren’t really confirming it

So I threw together a simple leaderboard to sanity check it

What it’s showing:

* most names are actually underperforming
* basically none are clearly “confirmed”
* only a couple are starting to show strength (like CRM)

The one that stood out the most to me:

MU has a really strong narrative right now  
and one of the worst price responses

which feels… off

My read is the stories are moving first  
and the market just hasn’t decided what it believes yet

Curious if others are seeing this too or if I’m missing something

link if anyone wants to poke around:  
[https://topicspace.com/leaderboard](https://topicspace.com/leaderboard)
